category_sources: Official GitHub README says zoro exposes a local server to an external network and supports TCP, UDP, HTTP, and HTTPS.
source_facts.description: Expose local server to external network.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is zoro.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation and includes install, usage, server/client, HTTPS, and examples.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/txthinking/zoro; repo returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub topics include tunnel, tcp, proxy, udp, firewall, nat, expose, and zero-configuration.
Official README describes exposing local TCP and UDP services externally.
